title: Implement strict READY promotion gate
description: Implement the HPOM READY promotion gate so incomplete or unsafe task records cannot be promoted to READY. The gate must validate the HPOM task contract across SQLite and exported task JSON, provide an audit mode for existing READY tasks, and add a soft claim-time defense for acceptance criteria.
acceptance_criteria: map_task.py create defaults incomplete tasks to BACKLOG or NEEDS_SHAPING rather than READY
scripts/promote_task.py accepts --task-id and reads the target task from SQLite and MAP_System/tasks/TASK-NNN.json

scripts/promote_task.py validates non-empty HPOM fields in both SQLite-derived task data and task JSON: objective, required_context, files_in_scope, forbidden_changes, acceptance_criteria, expected_artifacts, reviewer_role, risk
scripts/promote_task.py fails with a clear error naming each missing HPOM field
scripts/promote_task.py promotes a valid task to READY in SQLite and syncs file-backed task state
scripts/promote_task.py --audit flags existing READY tasks that are missing HPOM fields without mutating them
db/claims.py refuses to claim a READY task with empty acceptance_criteria as a soft claim-time defense
MAP_System/tests/test_promote_task.py covers valid promotion, invalid blocked promotion, and missing-field error messages
run_tests.sh includes the promotion gate tests and passes
